scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile ./docs/gtr-cof.js --target=browser --sourcemap=linked && mv ./src/gtr-cof.js ./src/gtr-cof.js.map ./docs/
scripts.gen-artifact: bun run ./scripts/generate-chord-changed-fixtures.ts && bun run ./scripts/generate-mode-changed-fixtures.ts && bun run ./scripts/generate-tonic-changed-fixtures.ts
